creator: m.atkinson@f5.com
text:
I updated sources yesterday and rebuilt to catch this change.   This morning I 
came in to find two machines at the debug prompt.   These machines differ 
somewhat from the other in that they are not forwarding, don't use pf, but do 
use the vlan device.  

net.inet6.ip6.forwarding: 0 -> 0
net.inet6.ip6.accept_rtadv: 0 -> 1
IPv4 mapped IPv6 address support=YES

# panic: Lock (rw) lle not locked @ /usr/src/sys/netinet6/nd6_rtr.c:655.
cpuid = 1
KDB: enter: panic
[thread pid 0 tid 100025 ]
Stopped at      kdb_enter+0x3a: movl    $0,kdb_why
db> show alllocks
db> 


[root@pogo-3 /usr/obj/usr/src/sys/POGO]#  kgdb ./kernel.debug /vmcore.0
